inputs.label: Dog Weight
inputs.businessContext: The dog's weight in kilograms, used as the base for calculating resting energy requirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: The dog's weight in kilograms, used as the base for calculating resting energy requirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Köpeğin kilogram cinsinden ağırlığı, dinlenme enerji ihtiyacının hesaplanmasında temel olarak kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Gewicht des Hundes in Kilogramm, das als Grundlage für die Berechnung des Ruheenergiebedarfs dient.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids du chien en kilogrammes, utilisé comme base pour calculer le besoin énergétique au repos.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso del perro en kilogramos, utilizado como base para calcular el requerimiento energético en reposo.

inputs.label: Activity & Life Stage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for activity level and life stage. Typical values: 1.6 for neutered adult, 2.0 for active adult, 3.0 for working/pregnant dogs.

label_i18n.fr: Facteur d'activité et de stade de vie
label_i18n.es: Factor de actividad y etapa de vida

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for activity level and life stage. Typical values: 1.6 for neutered adult, 2.0 for active adult, 3.0 for working/pregnant dogs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aktivite seviyesi ve yaşam evresi için çarpan. Tipik değerler: kısırlaştırılmış yetişkin için 1.6, aktif yetişkin için 2.0, çalışan/gebe köpekler için 3.0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Aktivitätsniveau und Lebensphase. Typische Werte: 1,6 für kastrierte Erwachsene, 2,0 für aktive Erwachsene, 3,0 für Arbeits-/trächtige Hunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour le niveau d'activité et le stade de vie. Valeurs typiques : 1,6 pour adulte stérilisé, 2,0 pour adulte actif, 3,0 pour chien de travail/gestant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para el nivel de actividad y etapa de vida. Valores típicos: 1.6 para adulto castrado, 2.0 para adulto activo, 3.0 para perro de trabajo/gestante.

inputs.label: Body Condition Score (1-9)
inputs.businessContext: 1=emaciated, 5=ideal, 9=obese. Used to adjust calories: underweight dogs need more, overweight need less.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1=emaciated, 5=ideal, 9=obese. Used to adjust calories: underweight dogs need more, overweight need less.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1=zayıf, 5=ideal, 9=obez. Kalori ayarlamasında kullanılır: zayıf köpekler daha fazla, kilolu köpekler daha az kalori almalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1=abgemagert, 5=ideal, 9=fettleibig. Dient zur Kalorienanpassung: untergewichtige Hunde benötigen mehr, übergewichtige weniger.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1=émacié, 5=idéal, 9=obèse. Utilisé pour ajuster les calories : les chiens maigres ont besoin de plus, les chiens en surpoids de moins.
businessContext_i18n.es: 1=emaciado, 5=ideal, 9=obeso. Se usa para ajustar calorías: perros con bajo peso necesitan más, con sobrepeso necesitan menos.

inputs.label: Desired Weekly Weight Change
inputs.businessContext: Target weight change per week as a percentage of current weight. Negative for loss, positive for gain. Affects calorie adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target weight change per week as a percentage of current weight. Negative for loss, positive for gain. Affects calorie adjustment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut kilonun yüzdesi olarak haftalık hedef kilo değişimi. Kayıp için negatif, kazanç için pozitif. Kalori ayarlamasını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Angestrebte Gewichtsänderung pro Woche in Prozent des aktuellen Gewichts. Negativ für Verlust, positiv für Zunahme. Beeinflusst die Kalorienanpassung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Changement de poids cible par semaine en pourcentage du poids actuel. Négatif pour perte, positif pour gain. Affecte l'ajustement calorique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cambio de peso objetivo por semana como porcentaje del peso actual. Negativo para pérdida, positivo para ganancia. Afecta el ajuste calórico.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
